notes: Full dinner menu captured (Bites, Plates, Cuts/steaks, Sides, Treats). No dietary marks published on the menu. '*' denotes raw/undercooked items, not a dietary tag. Cocktails and wine-by-the-glass not listed on the menu page; beverages left empty.

dishes.name: Bread Service
dishes.description: Tallgrass Bakery hominy bread, whipped butter, confit garlic olive oil, balsamic, maldon salt. Add burrata +6; add rotating house made salami, crunchy mustard, pickled shallots, cornichons +18.
